美股與國際市場 ·

傳貝萊德洽談參與SpaceXIPO 可望投入上百億美元級資金BlackRock Reportedly in Talks for a Multibillion Stake in SpaceX’s Blockbuster IPO

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6461329

  • 路透引知情人士稱，貝萊德正協商在SpaceX下月IPO中投資約五十億至一百億美元，實際金額或因定價與交割條件而調整。
  • 媒體稱此行IPO擬募集約七百五十億美元，公司估值區間約一點七五兆美元，若成真可能躋身史上規模最大的上市案之一。
  • 報導指SpaceX最快六月十二日於那斯達克掛牌，並將以五比一股票分割來壓低上市參考的每股牌價以利投資人參與。
  • 傳分割後每股公平市值約由五百二十六美元級降至約一百零五美元級，作業規劃在五月十八日當週啟動、二十二日前大致完成。
  • 貝萊德拒絕評論而SpaceX未回應，路透並表示尚無法獨立佐證相關說法的全部細節。

  • Reuters-linked sources say BlackRock may invest roughly $5b–$10b in SpaceX’s planned IPO next month; sizing could shift with pricing and deal terms.
  • Reports cite a ~$750b offering target and roughly a $1.75t valuation headline, framing it as potentially one of the largest listings on record if it clears.
  • SpaceX may debut on Nasdaq as soon as Jun 12 and plans a 5-for-1 split to lower effective per-share levels ahead of retail participation in the IPO.
  • After the split, fair value per share is said to slide from ~$526.59 to ~$105.32, with the mechanics starting the week of May 18 and done by May 22.
  • BlackRock declined comment, SpaceX did not reply, and Reuters noted it couldn’t independently verify every detail attributed to earlier reporting.
